special_mechanics.name: Spaceship movement
special_mechanics.description: Player controls a customizable spaceship with varying maneuverability stats. Different ships have different handling characteristics (e.g., Dragonhead has better maneuverability and smaller profile; Dragonwing is larger, slower, more heavily armored)

special_mechanics.name: Weapon mounting system
special_mechanics.description: Ship can equip front and rear weapons on same button, plus up to two external pods with independent buttons. Affects ship balance and control

special_mechanics.name: Shield and armor system
special_mechanics.description: Shields regenerate over time before armor takes damage. Multiple hit points required to destroy ship

tier_notes: Tier 2: Qualitative data from game documentation. Tyrian is a shmup with no documented jump physics or gravity systems (not applicable genre). No sub-pixel precision data available in sources. Movement parameters vary by ship selection and upgrades but specific numeric values not documented.
